titleStmt.title: SII 38.202: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 202. (A.R. No. 202 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanavīradēva Kulōttuṅga III Year: 35, Siṁha śu. di. 11 Friday uttiraṭṭādi = 10th August, 1212 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription consists of two parts. The first part records a land transaction effected by the sabhaiyār of Puṉṉaivāyil alias Rājanārāyaṇach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-koṭṭam alias Vikramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam. It states that during the thirty-fourth regnal year of the ruling king (1212 A.D.), Piḷḷaiyār Yādavarāyar, who without considering the ruined condition of the village, reimposed the waived tax called Poṉvari of the quartermāḍai. The revenue collector Vaḷaiyam Aḻagiyāṉ alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻa Paiyyūrnāḍāḻvān brought the warrant and insisted on the remittance. The sabhaiyār, who did not have any resources could remit only a portion of the total tax-amount out of the capital earmarked for the payment of kāṇiyāḷar and for the balance amount the sabhā members were held hostages and imprisoned.

The inscription then states that the members of the sabhā Vaṭṭamaṇit-Tiruvēṅkaṭa Bhaṭṭaṉ, Mādēva Bhaṭṭaṉ and others auctioned eighty vēli of land, called Śiṟupondāḍu Elumichchamēḍu at Kuḷattūr which was under their control with all its appurtenances; (to makeup the shortage of funds) and it was bought by Kāvaṇūr kiḻavaṉ Pichchaṉ Duggaiāḻvāṉ of Kāvaṉūr in Poḷigai-nāḍu in Maṇavir-kōṭṭam for two hundred aṉṟāḍunaṟpaḻaṅ-kāśu. The sale also conferred all the rights and privileges appended with such transaction and the sabhā also assured not to levy uriḍumvari and silliṟai. It also records that the lands were to be irrigated by the tanks of Kuḷattur-ēri and Puṉṉaivāyil-ēri. The members of the sabhā figure as signatories.
The second part deals with the apportionment of eighty vēli of land at Kuḷattūr alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻaṉ Kāvaṉūr. They are as follows:
3 vēli of land for Āḷuḍaiyār Tiruvagattiśvaram-uḍaiyār
2 vēli of land as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam to Nāṟpatteṇāyira Viṇṇagar-āḻvār
1 vēli of land as paḷḷichchandam to Nāṟpatteṇṇāyirap perumpaḷḷi
1/2 vēli of as piḍāripaṭṭi (for village goddess)
2 vēli of land as bhaṭṭavṛitti (for maintaining teachers)
1/2 vēli of land to the (buyer) Kāvaṉūr-Kiḻavaṉ Pichchaṉ Dukkaiāḻvāṉ for maintaining garden.

5 vēli of wet land, freed from taxes, to the same person as santāna-dharmam for renovating the vyākyāna-maṇḍapa, wherein it is stated that the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, was pleased to appear for fourteen days and expounded the fourteen vyākarṇa-sutra to Pāṇiṉi.

After this excluding fifteen vēli of land both as dēvadāna and iṟaiyili (tax-free) land, the reminder sixty-five vēli of land was allotted for conducting various offerings and worship to Vyākaraṇadāṉa-perumāḷ on those occasions when the God was pleased to appear at vyākaraṇadāna-vyākyāna-maṇḍapa, for the livelihood of both the teachers and students who studied vyākaraṇam and also for the repair and renovation of the maṇḍapa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ virābhiṣekamum vija
yābhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiya tribhuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 5 vatu muppattaiñcāvatu ciṅkanāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭātināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭup puḻal ṉāṭṭup puṉṉaivāyilāṉa Irācanārāyaṇaccaturvetimaṅkalattu sapaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇakkaiyyeḻuttu Ittevarkku muppattu nālāvatu piḷḷaiyāriyātavarāyar poṉvariyeṉṟu tarappaṭi nilattukku veli kālmāṭai pāḻkiṭanta Ūreṉṟu nikkā
te nāṭopāti poṉvari niccayittu vaḷaiyamaḻakiyāṉāṉa kulottuṅka coḻap paiyūrnāṭāḻvān taṇṭuvāṉākat tiṭṭuk koṇṭu Ippoṉ Iṟukkaveṇṭukaiyil kāṇiyāḷaṟku Iṟukka vikitamāy Eṅkaḷukku Uṭal Uḷḷa kottaṅkoṇṭu nikki niṉṟa poruḷukku Eṅkaḷaip puṇaittu ciṟaiyiṭṭuvaittamaiyil Ivūṟ sapaikkuc camainta vaṭṭamaṇit tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi mātavapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭittoṇaiyapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi patmanātapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi civatevapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi Aruḷāḷapaṭṭaṉum veṟpuṟattu Utaiyātittapaṭṭaṉum Oṭpuṟai malaikiṉiya niṉṟāṉpaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi śikriṣṇaRead śrī śikriṣṇapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi kantaiyapa
ṭṭaṉum Uṭālit tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi kantaiyapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi Aiyyaṉpaṭṭaṉum centiṟattuk karumāṇikkappaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi Āṭkoṇṭa villipaṭṭaṉum kāraāmpicceṭṭut tūroṇaiyapaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa sapaiyom Eṅkaḷūrp paṭākai kuḷattūr ciṟupontāṭu Elumiccameṭu Uṭpaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Irācatavaccerikkum peḷūṟkum melpāṟkellaiyāṉa peruvarampey teṟku nokkippoy vaṭukakkoṉ kuḻa naṭuvuṟp poypaḷḷicci kuḻi kiḻkkaiyey teṟku nokkip poy peḷūr Erikarai Uṟṟa varampukku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai peḷūreri vaṭakaraiye meṟku no
kkip poy koṉṉūrellaiyuṟṟuk koṉṉūr Otiyantaṅkal vaṭakaraiyey meṟkuṉokki poy kuṟaṭṭurrellai Uṟṟa Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ivvellaiyuṟṟa pirappaṅkuḻiye vaṭakku ṉokkip paiyyūrṉāṭāḻ‘ḻ’ is engraved below the line.vān kalluvitta Ammaierikkaraiye vaṭakkuṉokkip poyp puṉṉaivāyiṟpaṭākai piṟāvaṟai Uṟṟa caṇpaṅkuḻi Uṟṟa Ellaikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Ikkuḻiyiniṉṟuṅ kiḻakku nokkip poy nāṟpatteṇṇāyirakkon kalluvitta Aracaṅkuḻi naṭuvuṟap poyt tiṭṭākkāṭṭil nattattukkut teṟkup periyanāṭṭuk konkalluvit
ta kuḻikku naṭuvuṟak kiḻakku nokkippoyk kuḷattūrttāṅkal vaṭavācaṟuti Iṭaikkaṭṭey poy puṉṇaivāyileri karaiye vaṭakku nokkip poyp pullāntiṭṭaiyileyuṟṟu Irāmatavaccerikku nirpāykiṟa kālukkut teṉvarampey kiḻakku nokkip poy Uṭaiyār rājarājiśvaramuṭaiyār tevatāṉam māyārkāṭṭukkuk kaṇṇāṟṟile Uṟṟa Iṉ nilattile melpuṟattiṟ poṉakaṇṇikkāle teṟku nokkippoy Ikkāl kiḻakku nokkippoy muṟkoRead muṟcollappaṭṭallappaṭṭa kiḻpāṟkellaiyāṉa peruvarampile Uṟṟa Ellaikkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṟpāl
ellaikku naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilattu viḷainilamāṉa tarappaṭi nilam Eṇpatiṟṟu veliyum Ivvellai Uṭpaṭṭa taramiliyāṉa Ūrnattamum Eriyun talaipparappum karaiyuṅ kuḷamum toṭṭamum vatiyum vāykkālu maṉṟum kaṉṟunilaipāḻum kāṭum piṭiliyum meṉokkiṉamaramum kiḻṉokkiṉakiṇaṟum Uṭpaṭṭa Uṇṇilattukku puṉṉaivāyilerip pullāntimaṭaiyāl nirpāyak kaṭava nilappaṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭai nirpāyavum Ippaṭi viṟṟuttarak koḷviruḷiroveṉṟu kūṟa Immoḻikeṭṭu Etirmoḻikoṭuttoṉ Immaṇṭalattu maṇiviṟ koṭṭa
ttup poḷikaiṉāṭṭu māḷikaikkāvaṉūṟ kāvaṉūrkiḻavaṉ piccaṉ tukkaiyāḻveṉaṉ Iyāṇuṟo Uṅkaḷūrppiṭākai kuḷattūr ciṟu pontāṭu Elumaccameṭu Uṭpaṭṭa muṟkRead collappaṭṭaOlappaṭṭa nāṟpālellaiyum Uṭpaṭṭa Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi viṟṟuttariṟ koḷveṉeṉṟu piṟkūṟiya muṟkūṟiya puṉṉaivāyilāṉ koḷveṉeṉṟu piṟkūṟa muṟkūṟiya puṉṉaivāyilāṉa Irājanārāyaṇaścaturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom maṇaviṟkoṭṭattup poḷikaināṭṭu māḷikaik kāvaṉūṟ kāvaṉūr kiḻavaṉ piccaṉ tukkaiyāḻvāṉukku Eṅkaḷūṟpiṭākai kuḷattūr ciṟupontāṭu Elumiccameṭṭu Uṭpaṭa muṟkRead collappaṭṭaO
lappaṭṭa nāṟpālellaiyum Uṭpaṭṭa Uṇṇilam moḻiviṉṟi viṟṟukkuṭuppatāka Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅkācu 2 100 Iruṉūṟu Ippaḻaṅkācu Iruṉūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiyey kāṭṭeṟṟik kiḻikaic celamaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañceytu kuṭuttom puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṉṉaivāyilāṉa Irācanārāyaṇaścaturvvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Ikkāvaṉūr kiḻavan piccaṉtukkaiyāḻvāṉukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta kuḷattūr ciṟu pontāṭu Elimiccimeṭu Uṭpaṭṭa nilam viṟṟoṟṟi pratigrahaṅkaḷukkum taṉā
tikarmmaṅkaḷukkum Urittākavum Ivvūr puṉṉaivāyili niṉṟum veṟipiṟintu Iṟukkavum taṉperāl variyiliṭuvittuk koḷḷap peṟuvatākavum Ūriṭuvaricilliṟaiyeṉṟu nāṅkaḷ kāṭṭappeṟātomākavum kuḷattūreri vaṭavācaṟuti meṟku nokkippoṉa Iṭaikkāṭṭilkkiḻai maṭai Aṭaittu meṟkaṭaiyak kuṉṟaic cernta maṭaikaliṅku kaṭṭip puṉṉaivāyilerikku nir pukutap pāyakkaṭavatākavum kuḷattūreri niṟaintu mikka nir puṉṉaivāyileri kuṟaiyākap puṟampuviṭak kaṭavatallātākavum puṉṉaivāyilerip pullānti maṭaiyāl munpu pāyntuvarukiṟa kuḷattūṟ
kaḻaṉikkup paṇṭāṭu paḻaṉaṭai nirpāyakkaṭavatākavum viṟṟukkuṭutta Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅkācu 2 100 Ippaḻakkācu Iruṉūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiyey kāṭṭeṟṟik kiḻikaiccelavaṟak koṇṭuviṟṟuvilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ikkācukku Ituvey poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭc celavolaiāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutipporuḷ celavolai kāṭṭeṉap peṟātākavum volaikkuṟṟam meḻuttup piḻaivācakap paḻutenṟu collap peṟātākavum Irukālāvatum mukkālāvatum vilaikkuṟaviṟṟup poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu Ikkāvaṉūr
kiḻavaṉ piccaṉtukkaiyāḻvāṉukku viṟṟuvilaiyāvaṇañceytu kuṭuttom puṉṉaivāyilāṉa Irācaṉārāyaṇac caturvvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom sabhaikkuc camaiñcu vaṭṭamaṇit tiruveṅkaṭa bhaṣṭaṉum Ikkuṭi mātavabhaṣṭaṉum Ikkuṭi toṇaiyabhaṣṭaṉum Ikkuṭi patmaṉā(ā)ta bhaṣṭaṉum veṟpuṟattu Utaiyātitti bhaṣṭaṉum Oppuṟai malaikuṉiyaṉiṉṟāṉbhaṣṭaṉum Ikkuṭi śrīkraṣṇabhaṣṭaṉum Ikkuṭi kantai bhaṣṭaṉum Uṭālilt tiruveṅkaṭabhaṣṭaṉum Ikkuṭi kantaiya bhaṣṭaṉum Ikkuṭi Aiyaṉbhaṣṭaṉum cen
tiṟattuk karumāṇikka paṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi Āṭkoṇṭa villibhaṭṭaṉum kārampicceṭṭu tūroṇaiyabhaṣṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyom viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl Ippiramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ puṉṉaivāyilāṉa Irājanārāyaṇaścaturvveti maṅkalattu maittan puṉṉaivāyiluṭaiyāṉ Aruḷāḷapperumāḷ Utaiyañceytāṉ Eḻuttu sabhaikkuc camaintu vaṭṭamaṇit tiruveṅkaṭabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ikkuṭi mātevabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ikkuṭi turoṇaiyabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ikkuṭi patmaṉāta paṭṭaṉ E
ḻuttu Ikkuṭi civatevabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ikkuṭi Aruḷāḷabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu veṟpuṟattu Utaiyātittabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Oṭpuṟṟai malaikiṉiyaniṉṟān Eḻuttu Ikkuṭi śrīkṛṣṇabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ikkuṭi kantaiyapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Uṭāllit tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ikkuṭi kantaiyapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ikkuṭi Aiyanpaṭṭan Eḻuttu centiṟattuk karumāṇikkapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ikkuṭi Āṭkoṇṭa villipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu kaārāmpicceṭṭu turoṇaiyapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu ....kuḷattūrāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ kāvaṉūr nilam Eṇpatiṟṟu veli Itil Ivvūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvakatti
śvaramuṭaiyāṟku niṅku nilam muṉṟu veliyum viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyāṟku nilam Oru veliyum nāṟpatteṇṇāyiraviṇṇakarāḻvāṟku tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam nilam Iraṇṭu veliyum nāṟpatteṇṇāyirap perumpaḷḷikkup paḷḷiccantam nilam Oruveliyum piṭārippaṭṭi nilam Araiveliyum paṭṭavirutti nilam Iraṇṭuveliyum Ivvūr kāṇiyuṭaiya kāvaṉūrkiḻavaṉ piccaṉtukkaiyāḻvāṉukku maṉaippaṭaippaikkum toṭṭavaṭikkum nilam Araiveliyum Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāyaṉār pāṇiṉipakavāṉukku viyākaraṇa cūttiram patinālum patinālunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu Upatecam paṇ
ṇiyaruḷi vyākhyānam paṇṇi Aruḷiṉa vyakhyāṉa maṇṭapam Iṟantataṉaic ceyvittu vyākhyaṉampaṇṇuvippāṟkum paṇṇuvāṟkum Upajivaṉamākak kulottuṅkaṉukku Aṟivittuk kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ kāvaṉūr viṭuvittalāl viyākaraṇatāṉapperumāḷeḻuntaruḷi Immaṇṭapattait tirukkaṇcātti Aruḷit tiruvuḷḷamāy namakku Immaṇṭapamum ceyvittu viyākaraṇatāṉa vā(ā)khyāṉamum Iṟaṅkātapaṭi ceyvitta kāvaṉūrkiḻavaṉ piccaṉ tukkaiyāḻvāṉukku cantāṉattarmammāka Ivvūrile Aiñcuveli nilam naṉcai nilattile viṭukaveṉṟu tiruvuḷḷamāyaruḷa Ikkāvaṉūr kiḻavaṉ piccaṉ tukkaiyāḻvā
ṉukkum Ivaṉ cantāṉattāṟkum Iṟaiyiliyākac cantirātittavarai cellakkaṭavatāka viṭṭu niṅkiṉa niRead naṉcaiṉcai nilam Aiñcuveliyum Ākat tevatāṉaṅkaḷālum Iṟaiyilikaḷālum niṅkiṉa nilam patiṉaiñcu veli Innilam patiṉaiñcuveliyum nikki Allāta Aṟupattiñcu veli nilamum vyākaraṇatāṉa vyākhāṉamaṇṭapattil viyākaraṇatāṉap perumāḷeḻuntaruḷiṉa ṉāṭkaḷil pūcaikkum Immaṇṭapattil viyākaraṇamvācipippāṟkum vācippāṟkum Immaṇṭapat tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalākaviṭṭatu Itdharmmam Ippaṭi cantirātittavarai cellakkaṭavatu Itdharmmattukku Ilaṅkaṉañ colluvār gaṅkaik karaiyil ku
rāṟpacuvaik koṉṟāṉ brahmatticeyvārāvār Itdharmam śrīmāheśvararakṣai ..naṉṟāka ....hara ....
Digital edition of SII 38.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
